Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast

Class IdentListMerger

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.IdentListMerger
Direct Known Subclasses:
ArrayStream, MergingStream
public abstract class IdentListMerger extends Object
Stream of identifiers. Common protocol for merging sorted arrays of free identifiers.

  • Field Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected boolean
    errorFound
     
    protected static final String
    infinity
    A string which is known to be greater than any identifier name.

    buildMergedArray(Identifier[] result)
     
    protected static IdentListMerger
    buildMerger(ArrayList<? extends Identifier[]> lists, int first, int last)
    Creates a merging stream for the given sorted arrays whose index lay between first (inclusive) and last (exclusive).
    abstract boolean
    containsError()
    Reports whether an error has been encountered while merging.

    getBoundMergedArray()

    protected abstract Identifier[]
    getMaximalArray()
    Returns the origin (an array) of one of the longest substream of this stream.
    protected abstract Identifier
    getNext()
    Returns the next identifier (advance the stream by one).
    protected abstract int
    getPotentialLength()
    Returns the maximal possible length of this stream, that is the size of the array to allocate to store the results of reading fully this stream.

    makeMerger(ArrayList<? extends Identifier[]> lists)
    Creates a merger for the given sorted arrays.

    Creates a merger for the given sorted arrays.

    • buildMerger

      protected static IdentListMerger buildMerger(ArrayList<? extends Identifier[]> lists, int first, int last)
      Creates a merging stream for the given sorted arrays whose index lay between first (inclusive) and last (exclusive).
      Parameters:
      lists -
      first -
      last -

    • makeMerger

      public static IdentListMerger makeMerger(ArrayList<? extends Identifier[]> lists)
      Creates a merger for the given sorted arrays.
      Parameters:
      lists - non empty list of lists of free identifiers to merge

    • makeMerger

      public static <S extends Identifier> IdentListMerger makeMerger(S[] list1, S[] list2)
      Creates a merger for the given sorted arrays.
      Parameters:
      list1 - first list to merge
      list2 - second list to merge
      Returns:
      a merger for the given lists of free identifiers

    • containsError

      public abstract boolean containsError()
      Reports whether an error has been encountered while merging.

      An error is raised in one of the following cases:

      • An identifier is not typed.
      • Two identifiers, bearing the same name, have different types.

      Returns:
      true if an error has been encountered while merging.

    • getMaximalArray

      protected abstract Identifier[] getMaximalArray()
      Returns the origin (an array) of one of the longest substream of this stream.

    • getFreeMergedArray

      public final FreeIdentifier[] getFreeMergedArray()

    • getBoundMergedArray

      public final BoundIdentifier[] getBoundMergedArray()

    • buildMergedArray

      private int buildMergedArray(Identifier[] result)

    • getNext

      protected abstract Identifier getNext()
      Returns the next identifier (advance the stream by one).

      Returns null is this stream is exhausted.

      Returns:
      the name of the next identifier or null

    • getPotentialLength

      protected abstract int getPotentialLength()
      Returns the maximal possible length of this stream, that is the size of the array to allocate to store the results of reading fully this stream.
      Returns:
      the maximal possible length of this stream
